h97d89bf8g06a3g4816g9cc2g380bc331311e: An old fairy-tale my father read to me. The kind with a hero, a villain, and a moral.
ha15ae94fgeb5fg4059g8b4egb267b6232b1c: A farmer made a deal with a devil, so the story goes: in exchange for the farmer's dearest fruit, the devil granted him a bottomless coinpurse.
h7d61caa3g12bdg417eg98abg85a03f0d6dbc: The farmer's dearest fruit, naturally, was no apple nor peach, but his beloved daughter.
ha4e50ca7g6cb0g4f85g872fgab2b1f1bb7be: We can learn a lot from fairy-tales, don't you think?
h93cbff7cgf454g4de6ga083g2f63801b215d: Do not trust a devil. Is that plain enough?
h2a4f7194g86eeg4d5bg9644gdbb0b7dca3c9: Refuse him, no matter how tempting the offer, no matter how delicious the feast he lays out for you. The cost's always too great.
h254e4d6cg06cfg4aa4gb632g7466651805ab: He spoke of a cure. We have to at least hear him out.
hf4b8bbdcg219eg40f3gaa7dgcb56b970b231: Take a single step towards him, and he'll dog you the whole journey.
he8b78a5dg00c7g4703gb76fg332bacf83504: No cost is too great, if it rids me of this infection.
hb4876e94gff7dg4d43gb697gf2b1eb34a806: Refuse him like you refused Mizora? Only, you didn't, did you?
ha1b8bae2gb796g46f2g8ce7g2b4e568ff3b7: I made a mistake. This is your chance to learn from it.
h4853ae85g3bfag43e3gb8c2ge1e842df613f: The devil made an empty promise. Our only hope lies with my people.
h4209d7c6gf90eg4008g8975gfe2f18ebb01f: A devil wouldn't bargain if he thought there was no chance of success, Lae'zel.
h812ade8eg9d15g4a9fg9e93g0e95fbfa29e1: Trust me: He'll take what you're least ready to part with.
h05405917g3da7g40a4g999agcc73d5d1384d: You mean Raphael? We should at least consider his offer, given our circumstances.
hf53d1c07gdd12g4775ga058gf5e3e045b7f3: He'll require of you only what you're least ready to part with.
hb50c7adagce8bg4332gbf5ega74203518eaf: You might think you'd give up anything for a cure.
hb609a5ebgceceg43b9gaa35g5814a2076a66: But the devil won't take just anything. He'll take everything.
h0daf800egede2g4910g84e0gca42c3c9635d: Spare me the parables - I've no intention of bargaining with the likes of him.
ha3621d1fg02cdg4666gaa54gcdaa5d058204: That's because you still have hope. But when he becomes your last hope, remember this.
h7c5f5484g3c43g4e69g9ad5ge1ef39678876: Interesting, coming from someone who's already been ensnared by a devil.
hc1bb0283g3935g4e0cgb22egc620279ccc21: Who better to warn you of the danger ahead?
